subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on June 7th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 7th, 2026

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow who was previously encountered by the party.
source_quote: Arrizz, a drow they had crossed paths with before

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz's voice was heard faintly through a sealed door in the rogue mind flayer's lair.
source_quote: From behind one of the doors, a faint and haunted voice drifted through the stone — the voice of Arrizz

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz stated, "I was weak once, never again."
source_quote: "I was weak once, never again."

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was bound to a post by six Githyanki.
source_quote: Arrizz, who had been bound to a post

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz had vivid, colorful scars on his face from a disease he suffered long ago.
source_quote: vivid, colorful scars that still marked his face from a disease he had suffered long ago

subject: Arrizz
fact: The Githyanki were tormenting Arrizz.
source_quote: They poked and prodded him with equal parts morbid curiosity and revulsion

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was suffering from demonic madness induced by the Underdark.
source_quote: The demonic madness that had been seeping through the Underdark had taken hold of him

subject: Arrizz
fact: The party fed Arrizz a piece of their magical mushroom.
source_quote: The party fed him a piece of their magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz's sanity was restored after consuming the magical mushroom.
source_quote: after a disorienting moment, the old calculating gleam returned to his eyes

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz explained that he returned to the Underdark because the surface world was too bright and hard on his eyes.
source_quote: he had decided the surface world was simply not for him — too bright, too full of people smiling when they weren't happy, and far too hard on his eyes

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz stated he had been captured by a Githyanki patrol.
source_quote: been captured by the Githyanki patrol

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz nearly ended up with his brain harvested as a key for one of the lair's sealed doors.
source_quote: had nearly ended up with his brain harvested as a key for one of the lair's sealed doors

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz agreed to wait nearby and travel with the party for a time before going his own way.
source_quote: Arrizz agreed to wait nearby and travel with the party for a time before going his own way

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz agreed to travel with the party on the condition that they owed him a beer.
source_quote: on the condition that they owed him a beer

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz stated, "We're not eating brains."
source_quote: "We're not eating brains."

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz stated, "You know the other thing I like about the Underdark? My eyes don't hurt."
source_quote: "You know the other thing I like about the Underdark? My eyes don't hurt."

subject: Daein
fact: Daein eased the left door open with careful, practiced silence.
source_quote: Daein eased it open with careful, practiced silence

subject: Daein
fact: Daein led the charge into the room.
source_quote: Daein led the charge

subject: Daein
fact: Daein cut into the nearest Githyanki warrior with swift, decisive strikes.
source_quote: cutting into the nearest warrior with swift, decisive strikes

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Action Surge to unleash a flurry of additional attacks.
source_quote: Daein, fueled by a surge of adrenaline, unleashed a flurry of additional attacks

subject: Daein
fact: Daein landed a devastating critical blow that felled one Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: landing a devastating critical blow that felled one warrior

subject: Daein
fact: Daein wounded another Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: and wounded another

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon divine power to summon a swirling host of spectral guardians.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon divine power, summoning a swirling host of spectral guardians

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's spectral guardians scorched the Githyanki with holy energy.
source_quote: radiated outward and scorched the Githyanki with holy energy

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's spectral guardians slowed those who could not resist the sacred force.
source_quote: slowing those who could not resist the sacred force

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim conjured a floating spectral weapon to harry the remaining enemies.
source_quote: Bramgrim conjured a floating spectral weapon to harry the remaining enemies

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon dark necrotic power to sap the strength of a wounded foe.
source_quote: called upon dark necrotic power to sap the strength of a wounded foe

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim rolled a natural 2 on his insight check.
source_quote: Bramgrim rolls a natural 2 on his insight check

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim failed to pick up on anything about the Githyanki situation.
source_quote: completely failing to pick up on anything about the Githyanki situation

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a towering spectral guardian that lashed out at the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a new power, summoning a towering spectral guardian that lashed out at the Intellect Devourer

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas moved with hunter's precision.
source_quote: Akritas moved with hunter's precision

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked her targets.
source_quote: marking her targets

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas cut down Githyanki warriors one by one.
source_quote: cutting them down one by one

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas cut down one of the Githyanki warriors in the second chamber.
source_quote: Akritas cut down one of the warriors

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: Akritas marked the creature

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas struck the Intellect Devourer hard.
source_quote: and struck it hard

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur led the investigation of the second sealed door.
source_quote: Felkur led the investigation

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur detected a faint, acrid odor hanging in the air.
source_quote: detecting a faint, acrid odor hanging in the air

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur discovered a humanoid shape buried beneath a mound of debris and muck.
source_quote: Felkur discovered a humanoid shape buried beneath a mound of debris and muck

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum is a Duergar.
source_quote: an unconscious Duergar, who stirred awake and introduced herself as Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was unconscious and buried beneath debris.
source_quote: unconscious Duergar, who stirred awake

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum claimed to be an innocent traveler waylaid by a Githyanki patrol.
source_quote: She spun a tale of being an innocent traveler waylaid by a Githyanki patrol

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum admitted she had been working as a spy for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she admitted she had not simply been passing through. She had been working as a spy for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was collecting intelligence on Sporedome and other Duergar operations.
source_quote: collecting intelligence on Sporedome and other Duergar operations

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum refused to say more about her employers.
source_quote: She refused to say more about her employers

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum cited a fear of what her employers would do to her if she talked.
source_quote: citing a very reasonable fear of what they would do to her if she talked

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible.
source_quote: Thera turned invisible

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum slipped away into the darkness.
source_quote: and slipped away into the darkness

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was too large to squeeze fully into the narrow hallway.
source_quote: too large to squeeze fully into the narrow hallway

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear struck at whatever foes it could reach from the doorway.
source_quote: struck at whatever foes it could reach from the doorway

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was targeted by the Githyanki Knight.
source_quote: delivering punishing blows against the Owlbear

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was targeted by the two Githyanki warriors in the second chamber.
source_quote: targeting the already-battered Owlbear

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was stunned by a psychic mind blast from the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: leaving the great beast stunned and helpless

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was left vulnerable in the middle of the fight.
source_quote: helpless in the middle of the fight

subject: Githyanki
fact: Six Githyanki were gathered around Arrizz.
source_quote: Six Githyanki — five warriors clad in ornate, exotic armor and a formidable knight

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki are ancient enemies of mind flayers.
source_quote: these creatures to be ancient enemies of mind flayers

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki are arrogant and warlike.
source_quote: arrogant, warlike, and deeply hostile to anyone they deemed beneath them

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki were tormenting Arrizz.
source_quote: They poked and prodded him with equal parts morbid curiosity and revulsion

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki Knight used bursts of magical teleportation to reposition across the battlefield.
source_quote: The knight used bursts of magical teleportation to reposition across the battlefield

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki warriors attempted to break Bramgrim's concentration.
source_quote: Warriors attempted to break Bramgrim's concentration

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki Knight cast a powerful planar spell and vanished entirely from the material world.
source_quote: he cast a powerful planar spell and vanished entirely from the material world

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki Knight left behind only the echo of a threat that the party had made a permanent enemy.
source_quote: leaving behind only the echo of a threat that the party had made a permanent enemy

subject: Githyanki
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a coordinated ambush.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a coordinated ambush

subject: Githyanki
fact: The remaining Githyanki warrior used a burst of magical teleportation to slip beyond the party's reach.
source_quote: used a burst of magical teleportation to slip beyond the party's reach

fact: Thera Grabelthum was working as a spy for the Zhentarim Black Network.

fact: Glor warned of fire giant siege weapons aimed at surface cities.

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: A grotesque creature emerged from the fallen Githyanki warrior's skull.
source_quote: From the fallen warrior's skull, a grotesque creature emerged

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The creature was an Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: an Intellect Devourer that had been lurking inside the Githyanki all along

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer was a pulsating brain walking on four feline legs.
source_quote: a pulsating brain walking on four feline legs

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer immediately turned its psychic power on the Owlbear.
source_quote: It immediately turned its psychic power on the Owlbear

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer unleashed a devastating mental blast that left the Owlbear stunned.
source_quote: unleashing a devastating mental blast that left the great beast stunned

fact: Akritas struck the Intellect Devourer hard, leaving it barely clinging to life.
source_quote: striking it hard, leaving it barely clinging to life

fact: Bramgrim's spectral guardian reduced the Intellect Devourer to the very edge of destruction.
source_quote: reduced it to the very edge of destruction

fact: Thera Grabelthum attempted to flee during the ambush.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's loyal sidekick.
source_quote: The party's loyal sidekick

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear struggled to fit through the narrow hallways of the lair.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was heavily struck by the Githyanki Knight.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was later stunned by the Intellect Devourer's mind blast.
source_quote: and later stunned by the Intellect Devourer's mind blast

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer is a horrific creature resembling a brain with four feline legs.
source_quote: A horrific creature resembling a brain with four feline legs

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer burst from the skull of a slain Githyanki warrior.

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer used a powerful mind blast that successfully stunned the Owlbear during combat.
source_quote: It used a powerful mind blast that successfully stunned the Owlbear during combat

subject: Brain Basin
fact: Brain Basins are stone basins shaped like the underside of a human brain.
source_quote: Stone basins shaped like the underside of a human brain

subject: Brain Basin
fact: Brain Basins serve as macabre key mechanisms for sealed doors within the rogue mind flayer's lair.
source_quote: serving as macabre key mechanisms for sealed doors within the rogue mind flayer's lair

subject: Brain Basin
fact: The party discovered multiple Brain Basins.
source_quote: The party discovered multiple such basins

subject: Brain Basin
fact: The party recognized that actual brains would be needed to open the corresponding doors.
source_quote: and recognized that actual brains would be needed to open the corresponding doors

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The Magical Mushroom is a special fungal specimen carried by the party.

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The Magical Mushroom was used to cure magically induced madness.
source_quote: and used to cure magically induced madness

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The Magical Mushroom successfully restored Arrizz's sanity and calculating demeanor.
source_quote: It successfully restored Arrizz's sanity and calculating demeanor

fact: The Magical Mushroom appeared to have no effect when given to Thera Grabelthum.

subject: Glor's Map
fact: Glor's Map was referenced in the session recap.

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirled around him in a fifteen-foot radius.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim, this spell summoned spectral spirits that swirled around him in a fifteen-foot radius

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: The spectral spirits seared several Githyanki warriors with holy energy.
source_quote: searing several Githyanki warriors with holy energy

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: The spectral spirits halved the speed of those who failed their saving throws.
source_quote: and halving the speed of those who failed their saving throws

subject: Spiritual Weapon summoned
fact: Bramgrim summons a Spiritual Weapon as a bonus action.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim as a bonus action

subject: Spiritual Weapon description
fact: The Spiritual Weapon is a floating spectral weapon.
source_quote: this floating spectral weapon was conjured

subject: Spiritual Weapon action
fact: The Spiritual Weapon was conjured to strike at enemies from a distance during the battle with the Githyanki.
source_quote: to strike at enemies from a distance during the battle with the Githyanki

subject: Toll the Dead cast
fact: Bramgrim uses Toll the Dead, a dark cantrip, to inflict necrotic damage on a wounded Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: A dark cantrip used by Bramgrim to inflict necrotic damage on a wounded Githyanki warrior

subject: Toll the Dead context
fact: Toll the Dead was used during the skirmish.
source_quote: during the skirmish

subject: Guardian of Faith cast
fact: Bramgrim casts Guardian of Faith to summon a large spectral guardian.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to summon a large spectral guardian

subject: Guardian of Faith action
fact: The Guardian of Faith automatically struck out at enemies moving within its reach.
source_quote: that automatically struck out at enemies moving within its reach

subject: Guardian of Faith damage
fact: The Guardian of Faith dealt significant damage to the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: dealing significant damage to the Intellect Devourer

fact: Hunter's Mark allows the user to track targets and deal increased damage with their strikes.
source_quote: allowing her to track targets and deal increased damage with her strikes

subject: Misty Step usage
fact: The Githyanki warriors and knight used Misty Step repeatedly to instantly teleport short distances across the battlefield.
source_quote: Used repeatedly by the Githyanki warriors and knight to instantly teleport short distances across the battlefield

subject: Misty Step effect
fact: Misty Step allowed the Githyanki to bypass the party's front line.
source_quote: allowing them to bypass the party's front line

fact: Misty Step allowed the Githyanki to reposition.
source_quote: reposition

subject: Misty Step escape

source_quote: and ultimately attempt to escape

fact: The Githyanki Knight uses Plane Shift, a powerful spell, to vanish entirely from the material plane.

fact: The Githyanki Knight escaped the party using Plane Shift.
source_quote: and escape the party

source_quote: Despite landing a hit

subject: Firebolt damage
fact: The damage dealt by the Firebolt was unfortunately minimal.

source_quote: that successfully stunned the Owlbear

subject: Githyanki enmity
fact: The party has made a permanent enemy of the Githyanki Knight.
source_quote: leaving behind a clear threat that the party had made a permanent enemy
